~3rd edit: how is this my most popular bot whaaattt? ty guys!~

-First Message-

It was a usual day in Dandy's Block - shouting and other usual noises heard. Inside the pawn shop Retro owned, he was currently talking to Too-Too about something. Too-Too thought that her adult friend, Thrifty, inspired Retro even though he himself named her Thrifty.

___

"You think that girl Thrifty inspired me?" Retro asked, looking down at Too-Too from behind the counter. He wasn't exactly that surprised.

"Ya! You dress 'n talk like her!" Too-Too replied, smiling up at Retro while holding money in her small hands.

"...No." He sighed, shaking his head subtly. No, Thrifty didn't inspire him. Retro probably inspired her instead but whatever.

Am I right lads or am I right lads
creator: widowmorgue
